betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Ever find it hard to work under your ebf? 
Ever wanted to see the top of a multi without jumping?
Well now that you have access to nether stars, you can make the resising trinket.
Simply right-click an empty trinket after drinking a shrink or growing potion and you can have a permanent device that can augment your height.

Warning we are not responsible for your hitbox being inside the floor, please use it responsibly and not with commands.
